channel.title: GitHub Discovery
channel.description: Discover trending GitHub repos before they go viral

item.title: 🔥 microsoft/PowerToys — 136481⭐ (51.9/day)
item.description:
Microsoft PowerToys is a collection of utilities that supercharge productivity and customization on Windows
Score: 100/100 | Language: C

item.title: 🔥 DayuanJiang/next-ai-draw-io — 33364⭐ (70.2/day)
item.description:
A next.js web application that integrates AI capabilities with draw.io diagrams. This app allows you to create, modify, and enhance diagrams through natural language commands and AI-assisted visualization.
Score: 100/100 | Language: TypeScript

item.title: 🔥 malisper/pgrust — 2180⭐ (26.3/day)
item.description:
Postgres rewritten in Rust, now passing 100% of the Postgres regression tests
Score: 94/100 | Language: Rust

item.title: 🔥 google-labs-code/stitch-skills — 6827⭐ (39.0/day)
item.description:
A library of Agent Skills designed to work with the Stitch MCP server. Each skill follows the Agent Skills open standard, for compatibility with coding agents such as Antigravity, Gemini CLI, Claude Code, Cursor.
Score: 93/100 | Language: TypeScript

item.description:
